# `docusaurus.config.ts` Reference

Complete, annotated config for the Java & Spring Boot notes site. Paste and customize when bootstrapping.

---

## Full Config Template

```js
// @ts-check
const { themes } = require('prism-react-renderer');

/** @type {import('@docusaurus/types').Config} */
const config = {
  title: 'Java & Spring Boot Notes',
  tagline: 'Interview prep & knowledge base for Java backend engineers',
  url: 'https://your-domain.com',          // ← replace with actual URL or GitHub Pages URL
  baseUrl: '/',
  onBrokenLinks: 'throw',                  // ← MUST stay 'throw' — fails build on broken links
  onBrokenMarkdownLinks: 'warn',
  favicon: 'img/favicon.ico',
  organizationName: 'your-github-username', // ← GitHub username for Pages deployment
  projectName: 'exp-java-ai',              // ← GitHub repo name

  markdown: {
    mermaid: true,                         // ← enables Mermaid diagram rendering
  },

  presets: [
    [
      'classic',
      /** @type {import('@docusaurus/preset-classic').Options} */
      ({
        docs: {
          sidebarPath: require.resolve('./sidebars.ts'),
          editUrl: 'https://github.com/your-username/exp-java-ai/edit/main/',
          showLastUpdateTime: true,        // ← reads last_updated from frontmatter
          showLastUpdateAuthor: false,
          tagsBasePath: 'tags',           // ← URL prefix for tag pages (/docs/tags/...)
          remarkPlugins: [],
          rehypePlugins: [],
        },
        blog: false,                       // ← blog disabled; remove line to enable
        theme: {
          customCss: require.resolve('./src/css/custom.css'),
        },
      }),
    ],
  ],

  themes: [
    '@docusaurus/theme-mermaid',           // ← Mermaid theme (must match markdown.mermaid: true)
    [
      '@easyops-cn/docusaurus-search-local',
      /** @type {import("@easyops-cn/docusaurus-search-local").PluginOptions} */
      ({
        hashed: true,                      // ← cache-busts search index on build
        language: ['en'],
        highlightSearchTermsOnTargetPage: true,
        explicitSearchResultPath: true,
        indexDocs: true,
        indexBlog: false,
        docsRouteBasePath: '/docs',
      }),
    ],
  ],

  themeConfig:
    /** @type {import('@docusaurus/preset-classic').ThemeConfig} */
    ({
      navbar: {
        title: 'Java Notes',
        logo: {
          alt: 'Java Notes Logo',
          src: 'img/logo.svg',
        },
        items: [
          {
            type: 'docSidebar',
            sidebarId: 'tutorialSidebar',
            position: 'left',
            label: 'Docs',
          },
          {
            href: 'https://github.com/your-username/exp-java-ai',
            label: 'GitHub',
            position: 'right',
          },
        ],
      },
      footer: {
        style: 'dark',
        links: [],
        copyright: `Built with Docusaurus`,
      },
      prism: {
        theme: themes.github,
        darkTheme: themes.dracula,
        additionalLanguages: [
          'java',     // ← Java syntax highlighting
          'bash',
          'yaml',
          'json',
          'xml',
          'properties',
        ],
      },
      colorMode: {
        defaultMode: 'light',
        disableSwitch: false,
        respectPrefersColorScheme: true,
      },
    }),
};

module.exports = config;
```

---

## `sidebars.ts`

Always use auto-generation — never hardcode item paths:

```js
/** @type {import('@docusaurus/plugin-content-docs').SidebarsConfig} */
const sidebars = {
  tutorialSidebar: [{ type: 'autogenerated', dirName: '.' }],
};

module.exports = sidebars;
```

---

## Key Settings Reference

| Setting | Value | Why |
|---------|-------|-----|
| `onBrokenLinks` | `'throw'` | Fail CI on broken cross-links |
| `markdown.mermaid` | `true` | Enables Mermaid fence blocks |
| `showLastUpdateTime` | `true` | Shows `last_updated` frontmatter in notes |
| `blog` | `false` | Not needed for a knowledge base |
| `tagsBasePath` | `'tags'` | Consistent URL for tag browsing |
| `hashed` (search) | `true` | Cache-busts search index on each build |

---

## GitHub Pages Deployment Config

Add these fields for GitHub Pages:

```js
const config = {
  url: 'https://<username>.github.io',
  baseUrl: '/exp-java-ai/',           // ← repo name as baseUrl
  organizationName: '<username>',
  projectName: 'exp-java-ai',
  deploymentBranch: 'gh-pages',
  trailingSlash: false,
  ...
};
```
